records.section_title: 热变形过程中动态再结晶驱动晶粒细化的多尺度机理
records.claim_summary: CDRX 可由位错累积/回复、亚晶形成与旋转、储能和曲率驱动的界面迁移共同解释。
records.experiment_summary: Continuous dynamic recrystallization usually dominates the microstructural evolution in hot working of aluminum alloys.

mechanism_hints.phenomenon: Continual straining gradually increases the misorientation of subgrain boundaries, enabling the transition from low-angle grain boundaries into high-angle ones.
causal_chain: Continual straining gradually increases the misorientation of subgrain boundaries, enabling the transition from low-angle grain boundaries into high-angle ones.

records.title: Effect of stress state on flow stress and grain refinement mechanisms during AA2195 hot deformation

records.experiment_summary: The results show that grain refinement is highly dependent on stress state.
